# Silver Hoof Farm — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A horse farm and equestrian center offering a nature-connected experience rooted in the world of horses and riding. The business likely combines the rustic charm of farm life with the discipline and elegance of equestrian sports, appealing to horse lovers and riding enthusiasts of all levels.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://silver-hoof-farm.zappy5.app
Discover Silver Hoof Farm, where rustic charm meets equestrian elegance. Explore luxury farm events, youth riding programs, and venue rentals rooted in a true connection with horses. Book your visit today.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://silver-hoof-farm.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://silver-hoof-farm.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Silver Hoof Farm
A horse farm and equestrian center offering a nature-connected experience rooted in the world of horses and riding. The business likely combines the rustic charm of farm life with the discipline and elegance of equestrian sports, appealing to horse lovers and riding enthusiasts of all levels.

## Target Audience
- Equestrian Enthusiasts
- Youth Riders' Programs
- Luxury Event Organizers

## Industry
Equestrian / Agriculture
